componentContracts.description: Top-level continuity shell that owns the route-safe data markers, shell profile, and dominant-action law.
componentContracts.apiSignature: ShellFrame({ binding, specimenId, headline, summary, dominantActionLabel, promotedSupportRegion, children })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: One shell accent at a time; route-local markers stay on the root frame.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced default with compact inner regions only through surface-role children.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: The shell frame carries the root semantic surfaces, keyboard scope markers, and reduced-motion equivalence contract.

accessibility.summary: The shell frame carries the root semantic surfaces, keyboard scope markers, and reduced-motion equivalence contract.

componentContracts.description: Persistent navigation and taxonomy rail used for queue, evidence, and shell-profile context.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Secondary emphasis only; never competes with the specimen dominant action.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced or compact depending on shell profile; list-first posture only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Rail sections stay keyboard-first and inherit anchor restore semantics from their route binding.

accessibility.summary: Rail sections stay keyboard-first and inherit anchor restore semantics from their route binding.

componentContracts.description: Top specimen header for the current mission, combining quiet hero copy, one dominant action, and calm metadata.
componentContracts.apiSignature: ShellHeader({ eyebrow, title, summary, chips, children })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Hero copy may inherit the active shell accent but never a second semantic accent.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Quiet default; only one status cluster or action row may sit in the masthead.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Header copy forms the specimen summary and keeps the dominant action adjacent to its live-summary region.

accessibility.summary: Header copy forms the specimen summary and keeps the dominant action adjacent to its live-summary region.

componentContracts.description: Canonical quiet strip that combines ambient state, freshness, and settlement posture without adding a second command band.
componentContracts.apiSignature: SharedStatusStrip({ tone, stateLabel, freshnessLabel, settlementLabel, continuityKey })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Ambient state may use one semantic tone; freshness stays neutral and never becomes a second accent.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Compact inline strip; does not expand into a second promoted support region.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Status strip carries the live-summary state, freshness accessibility contract, and artifact posture marker.

accessibility.summary: Status strip carries the live-summary state, freshness accessibility contract, and artifact posture marker.

componentContracts.description: Single promoted support pocket for assistance, evidence, or follow-up context. Never more than one in a quiet specimen viewport.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Support frames inherit shell accent only as a hairline; the interior stays neutral.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced only; compact support frames are pushed down to rail or drawer surfaces.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Promoted support regions preserve return-anchor and artifact-mode posture without duplicating dominant-action markers.

accessibility.summary: Promoted support regions preserve return-anchor and artifact-mode posture without duplicating dominant-action markers.

componentContracts.description: Small semantic count or readiness pulse used for calm, glanceable mission status.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Pulse tiles may adopt a single semantic accent border.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: CasePulse retains semantic-state context and never encodes importance through color alone.

accessibility.summary: CasePulse retains semantic-state context and never encodes importance through color alone.

componentContracts.description: Ordered state ladder for progress, approval, or recovery that keeps causal transitions stable across reduced motion.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Only the active step adopts the route accent.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced. Dense state braids must move into summary-only tables instead.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: StateBraid retains ordered semantics and focus restore for progress or approval ladders.

accessibility.summary: StateBraid retains ordered semantics and focus restore for progress or approval ladders.

componentContracts.description: Dominant action dock with one primary command, one secondary action, and optional quiet utility action.
componentContracts.apiSignature: DecisionDock({ title, summary, primaryActionLabel, secondaryActionLabel, utilityActionLabel, dominantMarkerRef, selectedAnchorMarkerRef })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Exactly one primary button may carry the shell accent.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced by default; compact mode keeps the same focus order and action hierarchy.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: DecisionDock owns the dominant-action marker, stable focus restore target, and button contrast requirements.

accessibility.summary: DecisionDock owns the dominant-action marker, stable focus restore target, and button contrast requirements.

componentContracts.description: Freshness and replay-awareness chip that complements, but does not replace, the ambient state ribbon.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Freshness chips stay neutral until the route explicitly degrades.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: FreshnessChip reflects freshness accessibility contracts and communicates replay posture without color-only semantics.

accessibility.summary: FreshnessChip reflects freshness accessibility contracts and communicates replay posture without color-only semantics.

componentContracts.description: Primary status ribbon for current trust, state, or review posture. Always present when the shell exposes state risk.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Ribbon tone is the only semantic accent inside the shared status strip.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Inline, never expanded into a dashboard banner.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: AmbientStateRibbon mirrors live-state semantics and preserves polite or assertive announcement law.

accessibility.summary: AmbientStateRibbon mirrors live-state semantics and preserves polite or assertive announcement law.

componentContracts.description: Compact anchor reminder used to communicate what the system will restore or return to after an interruption.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Anchor stubs use neutral treatment and a hairline accent only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: SelectedAnchorStub surfaces return-anchor and focus-transition hints without introducing new interactive focus stops.

accessibility.summary: SelectedAnchorStub surfaces return-anchor and focus-transition hints without introducing new interactive focus stops.

componentContracts.description: Open working board for missions, overview clusters, and grouped primary content. Distinct from card or table surfaces.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Boards use shell accent only as a top edge or small indicator.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: BoardSurface groups primary mission content and keeps route-level semantic surfaces intact.

accessibility.summary: BoardSurface groups primary mission content and keeps route-level semantic surfaces intact.

componentContracts.description: True card role for spotlight or bounded supporting content. Not a universal wrapper.
componentContracts.apiSignature: CardSurface({ eyebrow, title, summary, children, tone })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Cards may carry one accent border if they are the spotlight surface.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: CardSurface stays semantically bounded and inherits announcement scope from its parent route.

accessibility.summary: CardSurface stays semantically bounded and inherits announcement scope from its parent route.

componentContracts.description: Focused task area with explicit action posture, different from a passive card or board grouping.
componentContracts.apiSignature: TaskSurface({ eyebrow, title, summary, children, tone })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Task surfaces may use a left accent rule to signal action ownership.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced. Dense tasks split into list or table subregions instead of shrinking type.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: TaskSurface preserves actionable semantics, focus restore, and one dominant action marker.

accessibility.summary: TaskSurface preserves actionable semantics, focus restore, and one dominant action marker.

componentContracts.description: Dense, vertical support surface for evidence lists, queue filters, or change history.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Rail surfaces stay neutral with thin shell-accent markers only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: RailSurface keeps list semantics and keyboard traversal stable even in compact density.

accessibility.summary: RailSurface keeps list semantics and keyboard traversal stable even in compact density.

componentContracts.description: Elevated support drawer or preview pocket with 12px radius and clear return-anchor law.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Drawer edge may inherit shell accent; interior content stays neutral.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: DrawerSurface preserves return-anchor and restore semantics for same-shell preview expansion.

accessibility.summary: DrawerSurface preserves return-anchor and restore semantics for same-shell preview expansion.

componentContracts.description: Explicit form grouping surface that carries field and error-summary contracts.
componentContracts.apiSignature: FormSurface({ eyebrow, title, summary, children, errorSummary })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Form surfaces stay neutral; field validation uses semantic state accents locally.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: FormSurface must retain field accessibility and error-summary contracts from patient and governance routes.

kernelBindings.note: Intake Self Service surface-state kernel binding
Intake Self Service automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: FormSurface must retain field accessibility and error-summary contracts from patient and governance routes.

componentContracts.description: List-first surface for request excerpts, queue rows, or evidence lines.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: List surfaces stay neutral; row badges may use semantic accents sparingly.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: ListSurface retains list semantics and keyboard order through queue churn.

kernelBindings.note: Support Ticket Workspace surface-state kernel binding
Support Ticket Workspace automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: ListSurface retains list semantics and keyboard order through queue churn.

componentContracts.description: Dense tabular surface for health grids, bounded data views, and parity-first visual summaries.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Table surfaces use accent only in bounded summary or row markers.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: TableSurface keeps caption, row headers, and table fallback parity for bounded visualizations.

accessibility.summary: TableSurface keeps caption, row headers, and table fallback parity for bounded visualizations.

componentContracts.description: Artifact or evidence viewing surface that explicitly exposes summary-only, preview, or blocked posture.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Artifact surfaces stay neutral and lean on metadata rather than large semantic fills.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced or compact depending on metadata density.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: ArtifactSurface keeps summary-only and preview posture explicit, with stable return-anchor law.

accessibility.summary: ArtifactSurface keeps summary-only and preview posture explicit, with stable return-anchor law.

componentContracts.description: Quiet primary button used for the single dominant action in a specimen viewport.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Only one primary button may carry the route accent in a primary viewport.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: QuietPrimaryButton owns dominant-action marker law and contrast-safe focus treatment.

accessibility.summary: QuietPrimaryButton owns dominant-action marker law and contrast-safe focus treatment.

componentContracts.description: Neutral secondary button that pairs with the dominant action without competing visually.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Secondary buttons remain neutral even in blocked or review states.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: SecondaryButton retains the same focus and keyboard semantics as the dominant button without the accent fill.

accessibility.summary: SecondaryButton retains the same focus and keyboard semantics as the dominant button without the accent fill.

componentContracts.description: Low-emphasis inline utility action for reveal, copy, or side observation.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Utility actions stay text-led and never use a filled accent.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Inline utility actions keep focus affordances even with restrained visual weight.

accessibility.summary: Inline utility actions keep focus affordances even with restrained visual weight.

componentContracts.description: Segmented tabs for bounded view changes inside a surface without changing shell continuity.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Selected segment may use the shell accent; inactive tabs stay neutral.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Segmented tabs keep tablist semantics and selected-anchor continuity.

accessibility.summary: Segmented tabs keep tablist semantics and selected-anchor continuity.

componentContracts.description: Passive or lightly interactive chip for route-safe status metadata.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Chips use outline or soft tint only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Quiet chips preserve legible text and icon contrast without relying on fill color alone.

accessibility.summary: Quiet chips preserve legible text and icon contrast without relying on fill color alone.

componentContracts.description: Interactive pill for bounded filter sets with count badges and keyboard-first toggling.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Selected filter pills may use a shell accent edge and neutral fill.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Filter pills keep button semantics and selected-state text cues beyond color fill.

kernelBindings.note: Support Ticket Workspace surface-state kernel binding
Support Ticket Workspace automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Filter pills keep button semantics and selected-state text cues beyond color fill.

componentContracts.description: Quiet text input frame with canonical focus and validation semantics.
componentContracts.apiSignature: InputFieldFrame({ label, value, placeholder, state, hint })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Focus ring uses canonical token; validation tone is local only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Input frames preserve field accessibility contracts and explicit hint wiring.

kernelBindings.note: Intake Self Service surface-state kernel binding
Intake Self Service automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Input frames preserve field accessibility contracts and explicit hint wiring.

componentContracts.description: Quiet multiline text frame with canonical focus, hint, and validation treatment.
componentContracts.apiSignature: TextareaFrame({ label, value, placeholder, state, hint })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Validation tone is local and never changes the shell accent.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Textarea frames retain field labels, hint text, and error-summary wiring.

kernelBindings.note: Intake Self Service surface-state kernel binding
Intake Self Service automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Textarea frames retain field labels, hint text, and error-summary wiring.

componentContracts.description: Quiet select frame for bounded, explicit option sets.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Select focus treatment uses canonical focus ring only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Select frames keep accessible labels, option semantics, and focus treatment consistent.

accessibility.summary: Select frames keep accessible labels, option semantics, and focus treatment consistent.

componentContracts.description: Grouped checkbox or radio options with quiet framing and explicit legends.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Selected controls use icon plus text cues, not color alone.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Choice groups preserve fieldset semantics and selection state without color-only cues.

kernelBindings.note: Intake Self Service surface-state kernel binding
Intake Self Service automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Choice groups preserve fieldset semantics and selection state without color-only cues.

componentContracts.description: Calm loading placeholder that keeps spatial continuity and avoids decorative motion.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: No semantic accent while loading.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Loading skeletons keep loading semantics and reduced-motion equivalence through static emphasis only.

accessibility.summary: Loading skeletons keep loading semantics and reduced-motion equivalence through static emphasis only.

componentContracts.description: Actionable empty state with one quiet next step and no dramatic illustration.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Only the action button may use accent; container stays neutral.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Empty states retain summary and action hierarchy for keyboard-only recovery.

kernelBindings.note: Support Ticket Workspace surface-state kernel binding
Support Ticket Workspace automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Empty states retain summary and action hierarchy for keyboard-only recovery.

componentContracts.description: Review-state frame for stale or aging information that preserves context and one follow-up cue.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Review tone only, never danger fill.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Stale states keep review posture explicit and preserve reduced-motion summary equivalence.

kernelBindings.note: Support Replay Observe surface-state kernel binding
Support Replay Observe automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Stale states keep review posture explicit and preserve reduced-motion summary equivalence.

componentContracts.description: Blocked or fail-closed state frame with one safe next step and no ambiguous implied action.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Danger tone only at the boundary and icon; body stays calm.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Blocked states keep assertive next-step semantics and safe focus targets.

kernelBindings.note: Support Replay Observe surface-state kernel binding
Support Replay Observe automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Blocked states keep assertive next-step semantics and safe focus targets.

componentContracts.description: Recovery-only state frame for read-only or guided continuation posture.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Success or recovery accent only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Recovery states preserve restore and resume posture without overloading the command lane.

kernelBindings.note: Patient Secure Link Recovery surface-state kernel binding
Patient Secure Link Recovery automation anchor map
Patient Secure Link Recovery accessibility coverage
Support Replay Observe surface-state kernel binding
Support Replay Observe automation anchor map

accessibility.summary: Recovery states preserve restore and resume posture without overloading the command lane.

componentContracts.description: Summary-only artifact placeholder for absent preview, handoff-only, or pending evidence surfaces.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: No semantic fill; posture is communicated through labels and metadata.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Placeholder artifact frames keep summary-only posture explicit and machine-readable.

accessibility.summary: Placeholder artifact frames keep summary-only posture explicit and machine-readable.

componentContracts.description: Comparison primitive for before/after or current/proposed values with list-first fallback content.
componentContracts.accentPolicy: Comparison uses text-led deltas and small accent cues only.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Comparison ledgers keep explicit summary text and structured row fallback data.

accessibility.summary: Comparison ledgers keep explicit summary text and structured row fallback data.

componentContracts.description: Bounded chart primitive that must always ship with summary text and a table fallback from the same data.
componentContracts.apiSignature: BoundedVisualizationPanel({ title, summary, tableCaption, data, tone })
componentContracts.accentPolicy: One semantic accent only, reflected in bars and summary badge.
componentContracts.densityPolicy: Balanced. Dense grids live in the table fallback, not the chart plane.
componentContracts.accessibilitySummary: Bounded visualizations must preserve summary text, table fallback, and parity projection refs from the same data source.

accessibility.summary: Bounded visualizations must preserve summary text, table fallback, and parity projection refs from the same data source.

specimenCompositions.label: Patient mission frame
specimenCompositions.headline: Patient_Mission_Frame
specimenCompositions.summary: Calm section entry with a spotlight card, quiet action row, bounded record excerpt, and one promoted support region.

specimenCompositions.label: Workspace quiet mission control
specimenCompositions.headline: Workspace_Quiet_Mission_Control
specimenCompositions.summary: Compact queue spine, preview pocket, active task surface, decision dock, and interruption digest stub.

specimenCompositions.label: Operations control room preview
specimenCompositions.headline: Operations_Control_Room_Preview
specimenCompositions.summary: North-star band, one table-first health grid, one bounded chart with summary and table fallback, and intervention workbench stub.

specimenCompositions.label: Governance approval frame
specimenCompositions.headline: Governance_Approval_Frame
specimenCompositions.summary: Scope ribbon, change envelope, impact preview, approval stepper, and evidence rail held in one quiet review shell.

gap_resolutions.title: Surface-role framing props were not named in the corpus
gap_resolutions.resolution: Every surface primitive now takes explicit `eyebrow`, `title`, and `summary` props so route-safe semantics stay visible and card-like wrappers do not absorb board, task, rail, or artifact roles.

gap_resolutions.title: DecisionDock command slots were implied but not typed
gap_resolutions.resolution: DecisionDock now requires one `primaryActionLabel` plus optional secondary and utility labels, which encodes the one-dominant-action law into the API instead of leaving it to shell-local conventions.

gap_resolutions.title: Visualization parity needed an explicit primitive contract
gap_resolutions.resolution: BoundedVisualizationPanel requires `summary`, `tableCaption`, and `data` props together so chart and table parity cannot be skipped or added ad hoc by specimen code.

follow_on_dependencies.description: Patient shell work should compose `ShellFrame`, `SharedStatusStrip`, `CardSurface`, `ListSurface`, and `FormSurface` directly instead of creating patient-only container primitives.

Support and staff workspace shells should specialize queue and replay content through `RailSurface`, `TaskSurface`, `DecisionDock`, and `SelectedAnchorStub` without forking state semantics or automation markers.
Governance approval and release flows should keep `StateBraid`, `ArtifactSurface`, `ComparisonLedger`, and `BoundedVisualizationPanel` intact while adding route-specific copy and evidence data later.
